[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 120
- Description: Butterfly Effect pipeline troubleshooting & fix
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/butterfly-effect-club/pull/3
  
  Details:
  Troubleshot and fixed the butterfly-effect-club automation pipeline which had been silently failing since setup.
  
  Issues resolved:
  1. Sync ERA Cohort workflow — empty ERA_SHEET_ID env var bug (PR #3 merged)
  2. Mint Cohort Trees workflow — missing ERA_PAYMENT_PROOF_B64 secret (set from attached receipt image)
  3. Mint Cohort Trees workflow — missing DAO_GOVERNOR_* secrets (generated keypair, set as repo secrets)
  4. Key format issue — PEM vs DER base64 for governor private key (regenerated in correct format)
  5. Sheet SA permissions — coordinated sharing with butterfly-effect-club@get-data-io.iam.gserviceaccount.com
  
  Result: Both workflows now passing. Run #27 (Sync) and #55 (Mint) both successful. 2 new cohort trees minted for Hajira Sajjid and Harram Gulfam.
- Contributor(s): Sophia Truesight
- TDG Issued: 120
